name: Image Stage Drift Correction
description: A time-lapse recording of a structure has suffered from camera drift. Stabilize (register) the image stack located at '~/ImageJ_Data/raw/drifting_structure.tif' so the features remain stationary. Save the resulting multi-frame stack to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/stabilized_stack.tif'. The output must be a multi-frame stack where the object is stationary, not a single projection image.
